name: Hostil
short_description: Hostil is a short emotional interactive tale about a young astronaut who has crashed on a extremely dangerous planet. No one will come to rescue him and his only hope is to move forward.
detailed_description:
Hostil is a short emotional interactive tale about a young astronaut who has crashed on a extremely dangerous planet. No one will come to rescue him and his only hope is to move forward.

  • 40 minutes of gameplay.
  • 12 captivating hand-drawn scenes.
  • 250 paragraphs of mysterious story.
  • Narrative, visual and musical puzzles.
  • An immersive sound environment.
  • Original soundtrack.
  • Suitable for all ages.
  • 12 secrets and achievements.

* By buying the game at its full price you are greatly supporting the developer. Thank you.

supported_languages: English, Spanish - Spain, French, German, Russian
